abilities.name: Juggernaut
abilities.text: This model reduces all damage dealt to it to 3 (if more than 3).

abilities.name: Laugh Off
abilities.text: If this model would be moved from an enemy model's effect, it may discard a card to choose not to.

abilities.name: Ready to Work
abilities.text: While this model has a Shielded token, it receives a (+) to all duels.

triggers.name: Focused Cleansing
triggers.text: This model heals 2 and may remove a token from itself.

triggers.name: Daze
triggers.text: Target gains a Stunned token and this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Fresh From the Forge
actions.effects: Remove any number of tokens from the target. If this action receives a raise, the target heals 2

triggers.name: Reinforce Plate
triggers.text: A friendly model within 1" of the target gains either a Bolstered or Shielded token.

triggers.name: Drive Out Slag
triggers.text: Make a Scrap marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Workers Rise Up
actions.effects: The target gains a Bolstered token and may move up to 3". Then, the target may declare this action targeting a model that was not targeted by the Workers Rise Up action this activation. This may continue until this action fails or there are no more targets.

triggers.name: Stronger Together
triggers.text: This model heals 2 and gains a Shielded token.
